title: austrodanthonia occidentalis
intro: Austrodanthonia occidentalis is a species of grass native to Australia, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Traditionally, Austrodanthonia occidentalis has been prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal benefits.
